-
 actions:
+  - action_show_bus_schedule
   - action_track_parcel

   - action_contact_admin

+  - action_llm_fallback
 session_config:

-  carry_over_slots_to_new_session: true
+  carry_over_slots_to_new_session: true
\ No newline at end of file

commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
version: "3.1"

intents:
  - greet
  - goodbye
  - affirm
  - deny
  - track_by_number
  - ask_bus_schedule
  - ask_order
  - ask_how_to_book_bus
  - ask_pricing        # ← THIS IS MISSING!
  - ask_support 
entities:
  - tracking_number
  - source_city
  - destination_city

slots:
  tracking_number:
    type: text
    influence_conversation: false
    mappings:
      - type: from_entity
        entity: tracking_number

  source_city:
    type: text
    influence_conversation: false
    mappings:
      - type: from_entity
        entity: source_city

  destination_city:
    type: text
    influence_conversation: false
    mappings:
      - type: from_entity
        entity: destination_city

responses:
  utter_greet:
    - text: "Hey! Welcome to our Logistics & Fleet Management System! 🚌📦"
    - text: "Hello! How can I help you today with bus bookings or parcel tracking?"

  utter_goodbye:
    - text: "Goodbye! Have a safe journey! 🚌"
    - text: "See you later! Take care."
    - text: "Bye! Hope your parcel arrives safely! 📦"

  utter_affirm:
    - text: "Great! 😊"
    - text: "Awesome! Let's continue."
    - text: "Perfect! What else can I help with?"

  utter_deny:
    - text: "No problem! Let me know if you need anything else."
    - text: "That's okay. How else can I assist you?"

  utter_ask_order:
    - text: |
        📦 **How to Place a Parcel Order:**
        
        1️⃣ Provide pickup address
        2️⃣ Give receiver's address
        3️⃣ Specify parcel details (weight, size)
        4️⃣ Make payment (online or at counter)
        5️⃣ Get your tracking number
        6️⃣ Track your parcel anytime!
        
        Need help with tracking? Just give me your tracking number!

  utter_how_to_book_bus:
    - text: |
        🚌 **How to Book a Bus Ticket:**
        
        📱 Via App/Website:
        • Select source and destination cities
        • Choose date and time
        • Pick your seat
        • Make payment
        • Get your e-ticket!
        
        Want to see the bus schedule? Just ask me!

  utter_default:
    - text: "Sorry, I didn't quite get that. Can you rephrase?"
    - text: "I'm not sure I understand. Could you try asking differently?"

session_config:
  session_expiration_time: 60
  carry_over_slots_to_new_session: true

actions:
  - action_track_parcel
  - action_show_bus_schedule
  - action_calculate_price
  - action_contact_admin
